突然有一日，妻子失踪了，从此再无音讯…
三年后，一个全副武装的队伍来到李清玄的茅屋前。
为首的女武神沉鱼落雁，倾国倾城。
她走进李清玄的屋子，看着李清玄为妻子所画的画像，陷入沉默。
你一个人住在这里吗？
你的妻子呢？
你等了她三年，值得吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/997538e01e1240005d4869da659ee740","author":"乔木11","author_id":"","book_id":"7007667367207504933","book_name":"女帝流落民间，被我捡回家","book_short_name":"女帝的夫婿","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7007672571940471296","read_count":"31210","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1069676"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"505","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fdf26298191775fba8d769e97e86dd1e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254706&x-signature=GfrUMPnmt8mkavN0K3kTsQbSGNg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"307479535425374","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.01850802e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211325069E583AB992595E62B965"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r
